references.purpose: Backend-specific SSH, Slurm/HPC, cloud GPU, and object-storage preflight, execution, monitoring, and cleanup rules.
references.evidence_boundary: Controls remote execution safety; it does not validate the scientific method or result.

references.purpose: Durable local and Slurm job specs, approvals, submission, status, cancellation, checkpoint, and output collection receipts.
read_when: before constructing a durable job spec
before submitting, polling, cancelling, or collecting a local or Slurm job
before approving a non-local resource allocation
required_before: submitting work through LocalBackend or SlurmBackend
references.authority: Codex Science first-party compute runtime contract
references.evidence_boundary: A job receipt proves execution state and collected hashes, not scientific success.
